currentGoal: Push the current public-safe jinuwiki snapshot into the GnuDaSsa/blue video-team package.
nextStep: Jinuwiki snapshot is ready to commit and push to origin/main.

verification.lastCommand: python -m py_compile video-team/codex-video-runtime/scripts/*.py; npm ci; npm run build; secret-pattern scan of video-team README and jinuwiki snapshot
verification.notes: Copied 38 public-safe jinuwiki files excluding .obsidian metadata. Confirmed GPT image anti-noise guidance is present in video-team/wiki-extract/jinuwiki/concepts/image-qc-criteria.md. Secret scan produced only expected false positives: documentation mentions API keys/tokens as exclusions, prompt token syntax, and external URL text. npm ci completed with pre-existing audit/deprecation warnings; npm run build passed.
